history.text: A declaration of independence was issued, making sovereignty the central political claim.
German and Soviet occupations changed control of the territory.
Estonia restored independence after a period of foreign rule, occupation or union.

worthSeeing.title: Tallinn Old Town:
worthSeeing.text: One of the best-preserved medieval cityscapes in Europe, UNESCO listed.

worthSeeing.title: Digital Nation:
worthSeeing.text: The first country to declare internet access a human right and offer e-residency.

worthSeeing.title: Lahemaa Park:
worthSeeing.text: Estonia's largest national park of forests, bogs, manor houses and rocky coast.
